active.text: STYLE LOCK: Gothic period live-action, mid-19th century; candlelight and lamplight, deep shadows, desaturated cool-warm palette; naturalistic film photography, one medium for all cast—no illustration, no modern detail.

PERFORMANCE LOCK: First-person confessional frame—the Narrator often leans toward and addresses an unseen accuser/implied camera when in the confession room; flashback scenes use objective staging where characters look at each other and scene action, not the viewer. Heightened nervous energy and controlled calm alternate in the confessor’s address.
